text: Entering this space as an office worker, I feel a gentle excitement—a shift from routine into curiosity. The play of light and color, the hum of ideas in the R+D space, awakens a feeling of possibility within me. Here, amid symbols of innovation and collective effort, I sense both belonging and inspiration. The juxtaposition of structured walls and creative displays encourages me to reflect on my own role within this evolving system, and for a moment, I am glad to pause and let others glimpse this shared journey.
